background: Refer to the problem of sampling workers to determine whether they are in favor of unionization. We assumed that 60% of all workers at a large plant were, in fact, in favor of unionization. Suppose we will randomly sample 100 plant workers and ask each if he or she is or is not in favor of unionization.

task.query: Use a computer and statistical software to simulate the sampling distribution of the sample proportion (p̂) of workers in favor of unionization.
